steps.title: Set off the which clause
steps.content: Which is known as Brownian motion is extra information about this type of movement. The sentence already has a comma after motion, so it needs a matching comma before which.

steps.title: Complete the comma pair
steps.content: A uses a colon after a phrase that is not an independent clause. C lacks the opening comma for the nonessential clause. D creates a fragment beginning with Which. The comma before which correctly sets off the extra information. The answer is B.
